Plugin.Name: Incus Dev Containers
Plugin.Overview: Install and manage Incus system containers for coding agents and stdio MCP workspaces on Unraid. Containers use a dedicated IPv4 NAT bridge that blocks common LAN, link-local, and Tailscale ranges while preserving public Internet access. This is deny-list containment, not a complete security boundary: review allow-holes and bind mounts, test your actual networks, and add stronger controls before running hostile workloads.
